Containers.Name: msf
Containers.Description: Open reimplementation of the MSM-style MosDNS + Mihomo manager for Unraid. msf installs a WebGUI Settings page plus a self-managed local service that runs MosDNS (DNS), Mihomo (proxy/TProxy), and the required nftables rules. Components are downloaded and managed by msf after you complete the in-app setup wizard. Custom Mihomo configs, proxy groups/providers, rule-sets and rules are editable in the WebUI (with a CodeMirror YAML editor); MosDNS/Mihomo/Zashboard cores can be installed online or via local upload for offline use. Persistent data lives under /mnt/user/appdata/msf. Update and remove msf from the Unraid Plugins page (not via the in-app updater).
Containers.Changes: ### msf 0.2.2 - Mihomo custom config: import, create, name, save, apply and roll back; manage proxy groups, providers, rule-sets and rules in the WebUI. - Local upload install for MosDNS / Mihomo / Zashboard cores (offline-friendly). - CodeMirror YAML editor with highlighting, line numbers, undo/redo and search. - Fixed ARM64 component download architecture mismatch (ARM64 systems fetch and verify ARM64 cores). - Fixed post-setup core download flow, Mihomo node selection/width, and MosDNS client source display. - Self-update install/restart fixed; WebUI and CLI updates reuse the GitHub proxy/acceleration settings configured during setup.
